message:
Implement P4.1a: Bundle Builder & Static Site Generator

Implemented comprehensive BundleBuilder for pages export:
- Creates site/ and private/ directory structure
- Embeds all web assets at compile time (index.html, JS, CSS)
- Copies encrypted payload chunks to site/payload/
- Generates integrity.json manifest with SHA256 hashes and sizes
- Computes short fingerprint for visual verification
- Writes robots.txt and .nojekyll for hosting
- Writes private recovery artifacts (recovery-secret.txt, master-key.json)
- Fluent builder API with config options

Added 18 tests (6 unit + 12 integration) covering:
- Directory structure creation
- Asset copying verification
- Payload chunk handling
- Integrity manifest generation
- Fingerprint computation
- Private artifact writing
- Security (no secrets in site/)
- Error handling (missing config/payload)
- Progress callback invocation

Also updated qr.rs with stub functions for QR generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
